message:
feat(dcg): implement deep CLI integration service

Add dcg-cli.service.ts with:
- explainCommand: Explains what a command does and why it might be blocked
- testCommand: Dry-run to test if a command would be blocked
- scanFile/scanContent: Scans scripts for potentially dangerous commands
- listPacks/getPackInfo: Pack management with caching
- preValidateCommand: Pre-execution validation for agents
- validateAgentScript: Script validation before agent execution

Add comprehensive unit tests for all CLI service functions.

Implements flywheel_gateway-8ll

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
